description.en: Create an account to save favourite universities and programmes, then access them across devices.
description.zh: 注册账号后收藏大学和项目，并在不同设备间同步查看。

description.en: Bring application windows, saved schools, and deadline reminders into a lightweight WeChat experience.
description.zh: 将申请窗口、收藏学校和截止提醒带到更轻量的微信使用场景。

description.en: Build a dedicated iOS and Android experience for quick browsing, saved items, and deadline notifications.
description.zh: 开发 iOS 和 Android 应用，支持快速浏览、收藏与截止日期通知。
